title: ajania korovinii
intro: Ajania korovinii, also known as Korovin's wormwood or Altai wormwood, is a perennial plant in the daisy family that is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Ajania korovinii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches and joint pain, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. Ajania korovinii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and widely used medicinal plant in traditional medicine.
